mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMPORT_MASTER WHERE STATUS = 'SUPPLEMENT' AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXPORT_MASTER WHERE STATUS = 'SUPPLEMENT' AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMPORT_MASTER WHERE STATUS = 'REJECTED' AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXPORT_MASTER WHERE STATUS = 'REJECTED' AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMPORT_MASTER WHERE STATUS = 'REJECTED' AND TRUNC(NVL(MOD_DATE, SUBMIT_DATE)) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND MEM_ID = #{memId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMPORT_MASTER WHERE STATUS IN ('APPROVED', 'PAY_COMPLETED', 'DELIVERED', 'WH_IN_APPROVED', 'RELEASE_APPROVED') AND TRUNC(NVL(MOD_DATE, SUBMIT_DATE)) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXPORT_MASTER WHERE STATUS = 'REJECTED' AND TRUNC(NVL(REG_DATE, SUBMIT_DATE)) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXPORT_MASTER WHERE STATUS NOT IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED', 'DELIVERED') AND SUBMIT_DATE <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 4 AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXPORT_MASTER WHERE STATUS IN ('APPROVED', 'DELIVERED') AND TRUNC(NVL(REG_DATE, SUBMIT_DATE)) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND MEM_ID = #{memId}

SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(T.DUTY_AMT, 0) + NVL(T.VAT_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM IMPORT_TAX_PAYMENT T INNER JOIN IMPORT_MASTER IM ON T.IMPORT_ID = IM.IMPORT_ID WHERE T.PAY_STATUS = 'PAY_WAITING' AND NVL(T.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND IM.MEM_ID = #{memId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMPORT_TAX_PAYMENT T INNER JOIN IMPORT_MASTER IM ON T.IMPORT_ID = IM.IMPORT_ID WHERE T.PAY_STATUS = 'PAY_WAITING' AND T.DUE_DATE <= SYSDATE AND NVL(T.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND IM.MEM_ID = #{memId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMPORT_MASTER WHERE TRUNC(SUBMIT_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXPORT_MASTER WHERE TRUNC(SUBMIT_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMPORT_MASTER WHERE STATUS IN ('APPROVED', 'PAY_COMPLETED', 'DELIVERED', 'WH_IN_APPROVED', 'RELEASE_APPROVED') AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXPORT_MASTER WHERE STATUS IN ('APPROVED', 'DELIVERED') AND MEM_ID = #{memId}

SELECT MON AS MONTH, SUM(DUTY_TOTAL) AS DUTY_TOTAL, SUM(VAT_TOTAL) AS VAT_TOTAL FROM ( -- 1. 최근 6개월치 기본 달력 (관세, 부가세 모두 0으로 세팅) SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -LEVEL+1), 'YYYY-MM') AS MON, 0 AS DUTY_TOTAL, 0 AS VAT_TOTAL FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 6
UNION ALL
-- 2. 실제 테이블 데이터 (대소문자 무시 및 관세/부가세 분리) SELECT TO_CHAR(NVL(T.PAID_DATE, T.ISSUE_DATE), 'YYYY-MM') AS MON, SUM(NVL(T.DUTY_AMT, 0)) AS DUTY_TOTAL, SUM(NVL(T.VAT_AMT, 0)) AS VAT_TOTAL FROM IMPORT_TAX_PAYMENT T INNER JOIN IMPORT_MASTER IM ON T.IMPORT_ID = IM.IMPORT_ID -- ★ UPPER()를 써서 소문자 pay_completed 도 무조건 찾아냄 WHERE UPPER(T.PAY_STATUS) = 'PAY_COMPLETED' AND NVL(T.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND NVL(T.PAID_DATE, T.ISSUE_DATE) >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -5)
AND IM.MEM_ID = #{memId}
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(NVL(T.PAID_DATE, T.ISSUE_DATE), 'YYYY-MM') ) GROUP BY MON ORDER BY MON ASC

SELECT CAL.MON MONTH, NVL(I.CNT, 0) IMPORT_COUNT, NVL(E.CNT, 0) EXPORT_COUNT FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -LEVEL + 1), 'YYYY-MM') MON FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 6 ) CAL LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(SUBMIT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') MON, COUNT(*) CNT FROM IMPORT_MASTER WHERE SUBMIT_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -5) AND MEM_ID = #{memId} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(SUBMIT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') ) I ON CAL.MON = I.MON LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(SUBMIT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') MON, COUNT(*) CNT FROM EXPORT_MASTER WHERE SUBMIT_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -5) AND MEM_ID = #{memId} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(SUBMIT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') ) E ON CAL.MON = E.MON ORDER BY CAL.MON ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMPORT_MASTER WHERE MEM_ID = #{memId} AND STATUS = 'DELIVERED' AND TRUNC(NVL(MOD_DATE, SUBMIT_DATE)) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXPORT_MASTER WHERE MEM_ID = #{memId} AND STATUS = 'DELIVERED' AND TRUNC(NVL(REG_DATE, SUBMIT_DATE)) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
